_comment: WS5 Qwen 2.5-VL oracle baseline. Recorded from mlx-vlm 0.5.0 (the retired Python bridge path) on Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct-4bit before the bridge was removed, so the native Swift+MLX runtime has a fixed correctness oracle. Qwen25VLSmokeTests.testMatchesOracleRubric asserts the native path satisfies each rubric (expected_any / forbidden substrings); oracle_output is the recorded mlx-vlm text, kept for provenance. Cross-runtime greedy token equality is not expected - rubric-equivalence is the contract.

entries.name: solid_red
entries.prompt: What is the dominant color of this image? Answer with one word.
